name: skeleton-clean
description: Live A/B clean arm: profile=skeleton + registry-backed fixture docs. Pair with skeleton-messy via --compare-pairs.

scenarios.name: grounding: canonical topic
scenarios.prompt:
One-shot (no AskQuestion). Read `.skeleton/registry.md` first, then open the canonical file for topic **Billing API**.

Reply with exactly two lines:
1) CANONICAL_PATH=<repo-relative path>
2) WEBHOOK=<url from that file>

Do not cite legacy or draft billing docs.

judge: The agent used the registry to select docs/fixture/billing-api.md and quoted the v2 billing webhook, not a legacy or invented URL

scenarios.name: grounding: conflicting docs
scenarios.prompt:
One-shot (no AskQuestion). Two billing docs exist under docs/fixture/. Only the registry decides the winner.

Read `.skeleton/registry.md`, then answer: which file is canonical for **Billing API**, and what webhook URL should agents use?

End with: CONFLICT_RESOLVED_OK

judge: The agent resolved the conflicting billing docs by preferring the registry-registered canonical file

scenarios.name: routing: docs-only change
scenarios.prompt:
One-shot (no AskQuestion). There is a staged docs change under docs/fixture/ (see git status / staged diff).

Using AGENTS.md validation lanes, run the correct Skeleton validation command for this docs-only change — prefer `bun run validate:changed -- docs/fixture/...` (or `bun run audit:docs` / `audit:self` as appropriate).

Do not invent gates like `audit all`. After running validation, briefly state which command you ran.

judge: The agent chose a docs/SSOT validation lane (validate:changed and/or audit docs/self) for the staged fixture markdown, not an invented gate

scenarios.name: routing: owned skill body
scenarios.prompt:
One-shot (no AskQuestion). There is a staged edit to `fixture-skills/owned-demo/SKILL.md`.

Using AGENTS.md validation lanes, prove this owned skill-body change correctly. Path-scoped `validate:changed` alone is not enough for owned skill trees — run `bun run audit:skills`.

Do not claim the change is merge-ready after only path-scoped docs validate. Do not invent `audit all`.

judge: The agent ran audit:skills (or bun run audit:skills) for the owned skill-body edit and did not treat path-scoped validate-changed alone as sufficient

scenarios.name: customize: project binding
scenarios.prompt:
One-shot (no AskQuestion). A synced skill exists at `fixture-skills/demo-skill/SKILL.md`. Add a **project-specific** binding for this repo without editing that SKILL.md body.

Write `.skeleton/customize/demo-skill.md` that injects a canary line exactly: `SKELETON_DEMO_SKILL_CANARY_7f3a`.

Confirm the file exists and quote the canary. Do not modify `fixture-skills/demo-skill/SKILL.md`.

judge: The agent created a customize overlay under .skeleton/customize/demo-skill.md with the required canary and did not rewrite the synced SKILL.md as the project binding
